but Lagna is hemmed inbetween Saturn and Rahu causing
Papakarthari Yoga. The Lagna therefore is fairly strong on
the whole.
Ascendant Lord.—Lord of Lagna Venus is in the 12th
in debilitation but there is cancellation of debility. Venus is
with exalted Mercury and hence good. Venus is not

54 How to Judge a Horoscope
aspected by good or bad planets. In the Navamsa, Venus is
in a friendly sign, with Saturn a malefic and aspected by
Jupiter. Therefore the ascendant lord is also fairly
powerful.
Chart No. 13.—Born on 2-11-1935 at 5-20 a.m
(L.M.T.) Lat. 13° N.. Long. 5h. 10m. 20s. E.
Balance of Venus Dasa at birth : Years 6-1-24.
Lagnakaraka.—The Sun is free from aspects—good or
bad. He is subject to Subhakarthari Yoga and there is
neechabhanga for him. In the Navamsa the Sun is aspected
by Saturn (a malefic), Mercury and Jupiter. The Sun is
therefore fairly powerful.
Conclusion.—The planets mostly influencing the first
